notes: Silhouette roughly tracks the photo's pose and proportions but the linework is broken, noisy and lacks the clean single-weight ink and structured stipple of an FAO plate.
specific_issues: broken, fragmented silhouette outline instead of a clean continuous contour
no defined almond eye with filled pupil — eye area is just a few small circles
no ring suckers articulated along the arms or tentacular clubs
stipple is scattered randomly across the body rather than concentrated in chromatophore fields visible in the photo
fin contour is jittery and dashed rather than a clean curve
tentacle clubs lack the clear hook/sucker articulation seen in FAO plates
overall reads as a noisy photo edge-trace rather than a scientific plate
